McConnellsburg, PA  17233

Fax:  (717) 485-9411
Email:
electionsdirector@co.fulton.pa.us
Office Hours: Monday - Thursday,  -  (Other hours by appointment)
PUBLIC NOTICES
NOTICE: ELECTION BOARD MEETING
There will be a Board of Elections meeting on March 24, 2026 at 9:00 A.M for casting of lots for placement on the ballot, located at the Fulton County Elections/Voter Registration Office,
101 L.W.W. Suite 102, McConnellsburg PA. 17233
NOTICE: PUBLIC TEST OF ELECTION EQUIPMENT
As required by law, in compliance with PS 25-3031.14(a), the Fulton County Board of
Elections will test the election equipment to be used at the Primary Election to be
held on May 19, 2026. Testing will be done Thursday April 23, 2025 starting at 9 AM,
at 101 Lincoln Way West, McConnellsburg, PA. Testing will determine that the equipment
will accurately count the votes cast for all offices.
For more information, please contact the Elections Office at 717-485-6872.
NOTICE:PRE-CANVASS/CANVASS
The pre-canvassing of mail-in and absentee votes cast in the various election districts of the County of Fulton at the Municipal Election on Tuesday May 19, 2026
will begin 7:00 a.m., prevailing time, at the Fulton County Elections Office located at 101 Lincoln Way West, McConnellsburg, PA 17233.
Canvassing will occur May 22, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. at the Fulton County Elections Office located at 101 Lincoln Way West, McConnellsburg, PA 17233.
Fulton County Board of Elections
Randy H. Bunch, Chair
Steven L. Wible, Vice-Chair
Hervey P. Hann
